title: Fix commons UI bugs + add satnav links

log.context: Fix commons UI bugs + add satnav links

All changes committed and pushed. Here's a summary:

**Fix 1 — Stale congress session guard (`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`)**
- Added `statSync` import
- In `restServeCongressActive()`, any session file with `mtime` older than 2 hours is now skipped before checking `status !== "done"`. Stuck sessions won't hold the badge indefinitely.

**Fix 2 — Smooth player movement (`/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`)**
- Removed `MOVE_INTERVAL`/`lastMoveFrame` tile-snap logic
- Added `vx`/`vy` velocity ...(truncated)
